lessons.cycle-65: Cycle 65: State.json was behind — cycle 64 (OpenClaw absorption, 57 skills) was committed to git but state.json still showed cycle 63.
lessons.cycle-75: Cycle 75: Added version 1.0.0 to 3 core cognitive atoms. Benchmark recalculated: 0.4135 (actual) vs 0.415 (state claim) — difference 0.2%. Remaining: 102 skills missing signature, 47 missing version, 206 missing IO_CONTRACT.
lessons.cycle-76: Cycle 76: Added IO_CONTRACT to 3 skills with version+sig — IO_CONTRACT 17→20. Benchmark: 0.3730→0.3776. IO_CONTRACT at 20/219 (9.1%). 199 skills missing IO_CONTRACT, 136 missing signature, 72 missing version.
lessons.cycle-77: Cycle 77: YAML frontmatter fixes — Added closing --- delimiter to 3 P0 skills. Valid YAML: 211→214/220 (97.3%). Structural improved 0.9142→0.9272. Benchmark recalculated at 0.5167.
lessons.cycle-85: Cycle 85: DRIFT YELLOW — state claimed overall=0.99 but actual=0.927 (6.5% overclaim). 1129 dirty files accumulated across cycles 74-84 were never committed. Root cause: cron evolution cycles edited files but git commit failed silently (likely due to scope). Fix: committed in 3 batches (state files, skills restructuring +1129, ephemeral cleanup -692). Then fixed 3 P0 broken YAML: IO_CONTRACT was embedded inside YAML frontmatter with **bold** syntax triggering alias-scan errors. 31 more files have same pattern — fixable in bulk. Signature at 42.1% remains benchmark bottleneck — needs bulk strategy beyond 3-file edit budget.
lessons.cycle-88: Cycle 88: State overclaim detected. Benchmark state=0.95 vs actual=0.8174 (-13.3%). Structural state=0.998 vs actual=0.7673 (-23.1%). Root cause: 10 dirty SKILL.md accumulated, 36 YAML invalid (mostly IO_CONTRACT **bold** inside frontmatter), 104 skills missing signature (47.2% coverage). 20 circular deps found. Fix: committed dirty files + 3 YAML fixes. Remaining bottleneck: 33 YAML invalid + 104 signature.
